response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, extensive exposure to cloud infrastructure (AWS), and relevant work with agentic workflows and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Proven experience with agentic workflows and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling at re:cinq
Deep full-stack expertise across TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, and distributed systems
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical mentorship via workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
AI experience appears incidental rather than core focus; insufficient evidence of 8+ years in production AI systems
Limited documentation of customer-facing technical leadership or enterprise AI deployment
